examples: This paper represents a CFD method for the design of NLF airfoils directly under transonic viscous flow conditions.
The design results show that the amount of the NLF satisfies the target requirements, and that the design approach used in the study is applicable to a wide rang of airfoils.
Simulation results show that the NLF algorithm has advantages of both less computations and better tracking performance, therefore, it can be widely used in radar engineering.
